summary: Direct WriteBatchAsync call violates the writer's non-empty batch precondition.

comments.body: CommentBatchWriter.WriteBatchAsync reads batch[0] to pick the archive table and assumes callers pass a non-empty batch. The old CommentBatching.Chunk loop never produced an empty batch, but comments is empty for clean reviews, so this now throws ArgumentOutOfRangeException. Guard for empty input before calling.
